title: semiliquidambar cathayensis var. parvifolia
intro: Semiliquidambar cathayensis var. parvifolia, also known as Chinese parasol tree or small-leaf parasol tree, is a deciduous tree species native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Semiliquidambar cathayensis var. parvifolia include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the bark, leaves, and roots of the tree are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
